name: Diabetic Easy Oven Stew
recipeIngredient: 3/4 lb Boneless beef round steak, trimmed and cubed
4 each Medium peeled potatoes, cut into 1-inch cubes
5 each Medium carrots, cut into 1 1/2-inch chunks
1 each Celery rib, cut into 1-inch chunks
1 each Large onion, cut into 1-inch chunks
1 can Chunky stewed tomatoes (14 1/2 oz size)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven, brown the steak in oil.
2. Add the remaining ingredients; cover and bake at 300°F for 4-5 hours, stirring twice.
3. Add the peas during the last 30 minutes of baking.
One serving = 2 starch, 2 vegetable, 1 meat; also 263 calories, 257mg sodium, 33 mg cholesterol, 38mg carbohydrate, 17gm protein, 5gm fat.
